description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a utilitarian design. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with the barrel featuring a series of circular cooling holes along its upper length. The grip is angled and made from a polymer or plastic material, providing ergonomic handling, and a large, detachable box magazine extends vertically below the receiver. The rifle lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a pistol grip configuration, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The front of the barrel is capped with a simple muzzle, and the top of the receiver appears to have basic iron sights for aiming.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a perforated barrel, pistol grip, and extended box magazine. It features a utilitarian, stockless design and basic iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, perforated barrel, pistol grip, and extended magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, cooling holes, and the narrow profile of the magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the grip and magazine clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, the grip, and the magazine's alignment.
